requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Interest Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Interest Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day it is placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: the day it is placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Alternative Reference Rate (ARR)' means any widely accepted ARR for the
respective currency as prescribed in RBI circular on Roadmap for LIBOR Transition
issued vide CO.FMRD.DIRD.S39/14.02.001/2021-22 dated July 08, 2021.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Alternative Reference Rate (ARR)' means any widely accepted ARR for the respective currency as prescrib

requirements.full_sentence: (2) 'Bulk Deposit' means Single Rupee term deposits of ₹1 crore and above.
requirements.object: of ₹1 crore and above

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Composite Cash Credit' means a type of loan product having a cash credit limit
with a fully savings module designed to take care of farmer's interest.
requirements.object: product having a cash credit limit with a fully savings module designed to take care of farmer's interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Current Account' means a form of non-interest bearing demand deposit where
from withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in
the account or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include
other deposit accounts which are neither Savings Deposit nor Term Deposit.
requirements.object: include other deposit accounts which are neither Savings Deposit nor Term Deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(5) 'Daily Product' means the interest applied on the end of day balance.
requirements.object: the end of day balance

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'Demand Deposit' means a deposit received by a bank, which is withdrawable on
demand.
requirements.object: a bank, which is withdrawable on demand

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) 'FCNR(B) Account' means a Foreign Currency Non-Resident (Bank) account
referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as
amended from time to time.
requirements.object: (Bank) account referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(10) 'Hindu Undivided Family' (HUF) means HUF as defined under Income-tax Act,
1961.
requirements.object: Income-tax Act, 1961

requirements.full_sentence: (11) 'Individual' means a natural person.

(12) 'Member of the bank's Staff' means a person employed on a regular basis,
whether full-time or part-time, and includes a person recruited on probation or
employed on a contract for a specified duration or on deputation and an employee
taken over in pursuance of any scheme of amalgamation but does not include a
person employed on casual basis.
requirements.object: a regular basis, whether full-time or part-time, and includes a person recruited on probation or employed on a contract for a spe

requirements.full_sentence:
(13) 'Notice Deposit' means term deposit for specific period but withdrawable on
giving at least one complete banking day's notice.
requirements.object: period but withdrawable on giving at least one complete banking day's notice

requirements.full_sentence:
(14) 'NRE Account' means a Non-Resident External deposit account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time
to time.
requirements.object: account referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(15) 'NRO Account' means a Non-Resident Ordinary deposit account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time
to time.
requirements.object: account referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(17) 'Retired Member of the bank's Staff' means an employee retiring whether on
superannuation or otherwise as provided in the bank's Service / Staff Regulations.
requirements.object: on superannuation or otherwise as provided in the bank's Service / Staff Regulations

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(18) 'RFC Account' means a Resident Foreign Currency account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Foreign currency accounts by a person resident in
India) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: account referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Foreign currency accounts by a person resident in India) Regulations,

requirements.full_sentence:
(20) 'Term Deposit' means an interest-bearing deposit received by a bank for a fixed
period and shall also include deposits such as Recurring / Cumulative / Annuity /
Reinvestment deposits and Cash Certificates.
requirements.object: as Recurring / Cumulative / Annuity / Reinvestment deposits and Cash Certificates

requirements.full_sentence:
(21) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modi

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall pay interest on deposits (other than current account deposits)
accepted or renewed by them in their domestic, Non-Resident Ordinary (NRO), Non-
Resident (External) (NRE) and Foreign Currency (Non- Resident) Accounts (Banks)
Scheme {FCNR(B)} deposit account on the terms and conditions specified in these
directions:
(1) There shall be a comprehensive policy duly approved by the Board of Directors
or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated in respect of:
Note: For limited purpose of paragraph 6(9), the meaning of 'bank' shall include
requirements.object: (other than current account deposits) accepted or renewed by them in their domestic, Non-Resident Ordinary (NRO), Non- Reside

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The interest rates offered on deposits shall be uniform across all branches and
for all customers and there shall be no discrimination in the matter of interest paid on
the deposits, between one deposit and another deposit of similar amount, accepted
on the same date, at any of its offices.
requirements.object: branches and for all customers and there shall be no discrimination in the matter of interest paid on the deposits, between one

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Interest rates payable on deposits shall be strictly as per the schedule of interest
rates disclosed in advance.
requirements.object: the schedule of interest rates disclosed in advance

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A bank shall maintain the bulk deposit interest rate card in its Core Banking
System to facilitate supervisory review.
requirements.object: interest rate card in its Core Banking System to facilitate supervisory review

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The rates shall not be subject to negotiation between the depositors and the
bank.
requirements.object: between the depositors and the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The interest rates offered shall be reasonable, consistent, transparent, and
available for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required.
requirements.object: and available for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) All transactions, involving payment of interest on deposits shall be rounded off to
the nearest rupee for rupee deposits and to two decimal places for FCNR(B)
deposits.
requirements.object: the nearest rupee for rupee deposits and to two decimal places for FCNR(B) deposits

conditions: If a term deposit is maturing for payment on a non-business working day
requirements.full_sentence:
(i) If a term deposit is maturing for payment on a non-business working day, a
<image>
bank shall pay interest at the originally contracted rate on the original principal
deposit amount for the non-business working day, intervening between the
date of the maturity of the specified term of the deposit and the date of
payment of the proceeds of the deposit on the succeeding working day.
requirements.object: originally contracted rate on the original principal deposit amount for the non-business working day, intervening between the date

conditions: In case of reinvestment deposits and recurring deposits
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In case of reinvestment deposits and recurring deposits, a bank shall pay
interest for the intervening non-business working day on the maturity value.
requirements.object: intervening non-business working day on the maturity value

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) Consequence of transfer of branch of a bank to another bank
Deposit accounts transferred from one bank branch to another bank branch on
account of takeover of bank branches in rural and semi-urban centres shall adhere
to the following conditions:
requirements.object: conditions:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) deposit accounts shall deemed to be transferred to the new bank and will
continue to be governed by the terms of contract agreed to between the
customer and the bank branch that is being taken over.
requirements.object: to the new bank and will continue to be governed by the terms of contract agreed to between the customer and the bank branch

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) the same rate of interest shall be payable till maturity on such transferred
deposits, as was payable at the time of takeover of the branch.
requirements.object: on such transferred deposits, as was payable at the time of takeover of the branch

requirements.full_sentence: No interest shall be paid on deposits held in current accounts.
requirements.object: held in current accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that balances lying in current account standing in the name of a deceased
individual depositor or sole proprietorship concern shall attract interest from the date
of death of the depositor till the date of repayment to the claimant(s) at the rate of
interest applicable to savings deposit as on the date of payment.
requirements.object: date of death of the depositor till the date of repayment to the claimant(s) at the rate of interest applicable to savings d

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions, interest
on domestic rupee savings deposit shall be subject to the following:
(1) Interest shall be calculated on a daily product basis as under:
requirements.object: following: (1) Interest shall be calculated on a daily product basis as under:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A uniform interest rate shall be set on balance up to ₹1 lakh, irrespective of
the amount in the account within this limit.
requirements.object: up to ₹1 lakh, irrespective of the amount in the account within this limit

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Differential rates of interest may be provided for any end-of-day savings bank
account balance exceeding ₹1 lakh.
requirements.object: end-of-day savings bank account balance exceeding ₹1 lakh

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions, interest
rates on term deposits shall vary only on account of one or more of the following
reasons:
(1) Tenor of deposits
A bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit
subject to the condition that minimum tenor of the deposit offered shall be seven
days.
requirements.object: of one or more of the following reasons: (1) Tenor of deposits A bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Size of deposits
Differential interest rate shall be offered only on bulk deposits.
requirements.object: bulk deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that differential interest shall not be applicable on deposit schemes framed
on the basis of the Bank Term Deposit Scheme, 2006.
requirements.object: schemes framed on the basis of the Bank Term Deposit Scheme, 2006

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided also that differential interest shall not be applicable on deposits received
under the Capital Gains Accounts Scheme, 1988 by a bank.
requirements.object: received under the Capital Gains Accounts Scheme, 1988 by a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Non-availability of premature withdrawal option
<image>
A bank shall have the freedom to offer term deposits without premature withdrawal
option.
requirements.object: offer term deposits without premature withdrawal option

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that all term deposits accepted by a bank from individuals (held singly or
jointly) for amount of ₹1 crore and below shall have premature withdrawal facility.

The interest rates applicable on term deposits withdrawn before the maturity
date shall be as under:
(1) Interest shall be paid at the rate applicable to the amount and period for which
the deposit remained with the bank and not at the contracted rate.
requirements.object: Interest shall be paid at the rate applicable to the amount and period for which the deposit remained with the bank and not at the co

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No interest shall be paid, where premature withdrawal of deposit takes place
before completion of the minimum period specified in paragraph 9(1).

conditions: in case of his ceasing to be so eligible
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, at its discretion, allow additional interest of one per cent per
annum, over and above the rate of interest mentioned in the schedule of interest
rates on savings or term deposits to bank's staff and their exclusive associations as
well as on deposits of Chairman, Chairman & Managing Director, Executive Director,
or such other Executives appointed for a fixed tenure, subject to the following
conditions:
(1) The additional interest is payable till the person continues to be eligible for the
same and in case of his ceasing to be so eligible, till the maturity of a term deposit
account.
requirements.object: allow additional interest of one per cent per annum, over and above the rate of interest mentioned in the schedule of interest rates on savings or term deposits to bank's staff and their exclusive associations as well as on deposits of Chairman, Chairman & Managing Director, Executive Director, or such other Executives appointed for a fixed tenure

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In the case of employees taken on deputation from another bank, the bank from
which they are deputed may allow additional interest in respect of the deposit
account opened with it during the period of deputation.
requirements.object: respect of the deposit account opened with it during the period of deputation

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In the case of persons taken on deputation for a fixed tenure or on a contract of
a fixed tenure, the benefit will cease to accrue on the expiry of the term of deputation
<image>
or contract, as the case may be.

(5) Bank Employees' Federations, in which bank employees are not direct
members, shall not be eligible for additional interest.
requirements.object: interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The additional interest may be paid on the following deposits after obtaining a
declaration from the depositor concerned, that the monies deposited or which may
be deposited from time to time into such account belong to the depositor:
Note: Additional interest admissible to the bank's staff shall not be paid on the
compensation awarded by the court to a minor child and deposited in the joint
name of minor child and parent as the money belongs to the minor child and
not the bank's staff.
requirements.object: compensation awarded by the court to a minor child and deposited in the joint name of minor child and parent as the money belongs to th

conditions:
provided that the staff member /
retired staff member is the principal account holder
requirements.object: retired staff member is the principal account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may, at its discretion, formulate term deposit schemes specifically for
resident Indian senior citizens, offering higher and fixed rates of interest as
compared to normal deposits of any size.
requirements.object: formulate term deposit schemes specifically for resident Indian senior citizens, offering higher and fixed rates of interest as c

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that this facility is not offered on the term deposit standing in the name of
an HUF or the Karta of the HUF, even if the Karta is a resident Indian senior citizen.
requirements.object: offered on the term deposit standing in the name of an HUF or the Karta of the HUF, even if the Karta is a resident Indian senior

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may, at its discretion, give its resident Indian retired staffs, who are
senior citizens, the benefit of additional interest rates as admissible to senior citizens
over and above the additional interest payable to them by virtue of their being retired
members of the bank's staff.
requirements.object: give its resident Indian retired staffs, who are senior citizens, the benefit of additional interest rates as admissible to senio

requirements.full_sentence:
The rate of interest to be paid on renewal of overdue term deposits shall be
subject to the stipulation contained in the paragraph 6 of these Directions.
requirements.object: stipulation contained in the paragraph 6 of these Directions

conditions: If a Term Deposit (TD) matures and proceeds are unpaid
requirements.full_sentence:
If a Term Deposit (TD) matures and proceeds are unpaid, the amount left
unclaimed with a bank, shall attract rate of interest as applicable to savings account
<image>
or the contracted rate of interest on the matured TD, whichever is lower.
requirements.object: as applicable to savings account <image> or the contracted rate of interest on the matured TD, whichever is lower

requirements.full_sentence:
Floating rate domestic term deposits shall be linked to a directly observable and
transparent market determined external benchmark.
requirements.object: directly observable and transparent market determined external benchmark

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on savings deposit shall be credited by a bank at quarterly or shorter
intervals.
requirements.object: bank at quarterly or shorter intervals

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on savings bank accounts, including those frozen by the enforcement
authorities, shall be credited on regular basis, irrespective of the operational status of
the account.
requirements.object: basis, irrespective of the operational status of the account

conditions:
where one of the depositors has
died
requirements.full_sentence:
The rate of interest on matured deposits standing in the name of a deceased
individual depositor or two or more joint depositors, where one of the depositors has
died, shall be as per comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits and subject
to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions.
requirements.object: policy on interest rate on deposits and subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest, if any, on the minimum credit balance in the composite cash credit
account of a farmer maintained with a bank during the period from the 10th to the
last day of each calendar month shall be paid, subject to the conditions given in
paragraph 6 of these Directions.

There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
term deposits, including partial premature withdrawal, approved by the Board of
Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated.
requirements.object: on penalties for premature withdrawal of term deposits, including partial premature withdrawal, approved by the Board of Dir

requirements.full_sentence:
The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of deposits.
requirements.object: the notice of the depositors at the time of acceptance of deposits

requirements.full_sentence: If not, no penalty shall be levied.

In case of splitting of the amount of term deposit at the request from the
claimant(s) of deceased depositors or joint account holders, no penalty for premature
withdrawal of the term deposit shall be levied if the period and aggregate amount of
<image>
the deposit do not undergo any change.
requirements.object: period and aggregate amount of <image> the deposit do not undergo any change

requirements.full_sentence:
No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentioned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.

Rupee deposits of non-residents under NRE and NRO deposits shall be
accepted only by those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
requirements.object: those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on deposits of money accepted or renewed under NRE / NRO deposit
scheme shall be on the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs:
(1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of
these Directions.
requirements.object: and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Interest rates on savings deposits under NRE Deposits / NRO Deposits shall be
in accordance with paragraph 8 of these Directions.
requirements.object: paragraph 8 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Interest rates on NRE / NRO term deposits shall vary only on account of one or
more of the following reasons:
requirements.object: of one or more of the following reasons:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Tenor of deposits
A bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit
subject to the condition that minimum tenor of NRE term deposits shall be one
year and that of NRO term deposits shall be seven days.
requirements.object: determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit subject to the condition that minimum tenor of NRE term deposits shall be one year a

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Size of deposits
Differential interest rate shall be offered only on bulk deposits.
requirements.object: bulk deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Non-availability of premature withdrawal option
A bank shall have the freedom to offer NRE / NRO term deposits without
premature withdrawal option.
requirements.object: offer NRE / NRO term deposits without premature withdrawal option

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that all NRE / NRO term deposits accepted from individuals (held singly
or jointly) for amount of ₹1 crore and below shall have premature withdrawal
facility.

(4) I nterest rates on NRE / NRO deposits shall not be higher than those offered by
the bank on comparable domestic rupee term deposits1.
requirements.object: offered by the bank on comparable domestic rupee term deposits1

requirements.full_sentence:
Any transfer from NRO accounts to
<image>
NRE accounts shall not qualify for such exemptioni.

(5) The benefit of additional interest rate on deposits on account of being bank's
own staff or senior citizens shall not be available to NRE and NRO deposits.
requirements.object: and NRO deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Interest on savings deposits shall be credited at quarterly or shorter intervals by
a bank.
requirements.object: or shorter intervals by a bank

conditions: If an NRE account holder
requirements.full_sentence:
(7) If an NRE account holder, immediately on return to India, requests for
conversion of the NRE term deposit into Resident Foreign Currency (RFC) account,
interest shall be paid as under:

conditions: If the NRE deposit has not run for a minimum period of one year
requirements.full_sentence:
(i) If the NRE deposit has not run for a minimum period of one year, interest shall
be paid at a rate not exceeding the rate payable on savings deposits held in
RFC accounts.
requirements.object: rate not exceeding the rate payable on savings deposits held in RFC accounts

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) In all other cases, interest shall be paid at the contracted rate.
requirements.object: contracted rate

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not mark any type of lien, direct or indirect, against NRE saving
deposits.
requirements.object: lien, direct or indirect, against NRE saving deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
NRE term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the
Board to which powers have been delegated, subject to the following:
(1) The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of the deposits.
requirements.object: on penalties for premature withdrawal of NRE term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No penalty shall be levied for premature withdrawal of NRE term deposits for
conversion into RFC account.
requirements.object: withdrawal of NRE term deposits for conversion into RFC account

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Penalties for premature withdrawal shall be levied for conversion of NRE deposit
into FCNR(B) deposit and vice versa.
requirements.object: of NRE deposit into FCNR(B) deposit and vice versa

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentionned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.

conditions:
In case the claimant(s) of an NRE term deposit account of a deceased depositor
are residents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the claimant(s) of an NRE term deposit account of a deceased depositor
are residents, the deposit on maturity shall be treated as a domestic rupee term
deposit and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at a rate applicable to a
domestic term deposit of similar maturity.
requirements.object: domestic rupee term deposit and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at a rate applicable to a domestic term deposit of si

requirements.full_sentence:
Foreign Currency Deposits under FCNR(B) Scheme shall be accepted only by
those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange Management Act,1999
(FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
requirements.object: those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange Management Act,1999 (FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on deposits of money accepted or renewed under the FCNR(B) Scheme
shall be in accordance with the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing
paragraphs:
(1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of
these Directions.
requirements.object: the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid dow

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Interest rates on term deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme shall vary only on
account of one or more of the following reasons:
requirements.object: of one or more of the following reasons:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Tenor of deposits
The maturity period for term deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme shall be as
under:
a) One year and above but less than two years;
requirements.object: One year and above but less than two years

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, no bank shall accept or renew FCNR(B) deposits over five years
and no recurring deposits shall be accepted under the FCNR(B) Scheme.
requirements.object: deposits over five years and no recurring deposits shall be accepted under the FCNR(B) Scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Size of deposits
A bank shall, at its discretion, decide the currency-wise minimum quantum on
which differential rates of interest may be offered.
requirements.object: decide the currency-wise minimum quantum on which differential rates of interest may be offered

conditions:
where differential rates of interest are
offered
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) The interest rates on all deposits, including where differential rates of interest are
offered, shall be subject to the overall ceiling prescribed at paragraph 31(7) below.
requirements.object: overall ceiling prescribed at paragraph 31(7) below

conditions: in case of fixed rate deposits
requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Interest on floating rate deposits shall be paid within the ceiling of swap rates for
the respective currency / maturity and in case of fixed rate deposits, interest shall be
paid within the ceiling of Overnight Alternative Reference Rate (ARR) for the
respective currency / maturity.
requirements.object: ceiling of swap rates for the respective currency / maturity and in case of fixed rate deposits, interest shall be paid within the

requirements.full_sentence: (5) The interest reset period shall be six months for all floating rate deposits.
requirements.object: all floating rate deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The Overnight ARR for the respective currency / SWAP rates as on the last
working day of the preceding month shall form the base for fixing ceiling rates for the
interest rates offered effective in the following month.
requirements.object: fixing ceiling rates for the interest rates offered effective in the following month

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The interest rates ceiling on FCNR(B) deposits shall be as under:
Period of Deposit Ceiling Rate
One year to less than three
Overnight ARR for the respective currency / Swap
years
plus 250 basis points
Three years and above upto and
Overnight ARR for the respective currency / Swap
plus 3502 basis points
including five years
2 The interest rate ceiling applicable to fresh FCNR(B) deposits mobilised by banks,
including the deposits that are renewed upon maturity, for three years and above-
upto and including five years tenors, is temporarily withdrawn with effect from June
17, 2026, for the period until September 30, 2026ii.
requirements.object: of Deposit Ceiling Rate One year to less than three Overnight ARR for the respective currency / Swap years plus 250 basis points T

requirements.full_sentence:
(FBIL) shall be used as the reference for
arriving at the interest rates on FCNR(B) deposits.
requirements.object: reference for arriving at the interest rates on FCNR(B) deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on the deposits accepted under the Scheme shall be calculated on the
basis of 360 days to a year.
requirements.object: basis of 360 days to a year

requirements.full_sentence:
The interest on FCNR (B) deposits shall be calculated and paid at intervals of
180 days each and thereafter for the remaining actual number of days.
requirements.object: at intervals of 180 days each and thereafter for the remaining actual number of days

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the option to receive the interest on maturity with compounding effect
shall vest with the depositor.

conditions:
If the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive)
does not exceed 14 days
when the depositor seeks renewal
requirements.full_sentence:
Interest calculation on renewal of FCNR(B) deposits shall be as under:
(1) If the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive)
does not exceed 14 days, the rate of interest payable on the amount of the deposit
so renewed shall be the appropriate rate of interest for the period of renewal as
prevailing on the date of maturity or on the date when the depositor seeks renewal,
whichever is lower.
requirements.object: If the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive) does not exceed 14 days, the rate of interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In all other cases of renewal, interest rates for the overdue period on the
renewed amount shall be determined by treating it as a fresh term deposit.
requirements.object: it as a fresh term deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) If, after renewal, the deposit is withdrawn before completion of the minimum
stipulated period under the Scheme, a bank authorised under FEMA, 1999, may, at
its discretion, recover the interest paid for the overdue period, i.e., period beyond the
original date of maturity.
requirements.object: recover the interest paid for the overdue period, i

conditions:
where one
of the depositors has died
If paid on the maturity of the deposit
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall pay interest on the term deposits standing in the name(s) of a
deceased FCNR(B) individual depositor or two or more joint depositors, where one
of the depositors has died, as under:
(1) If paid on the maturity of the deposit, interest shall be paid at the contracted rate.
requirements.object: term deposits standing in the name(s) of a deceased FCNR(B) individual depositor or two or more joint depositors

conditions: If the deposit is claimed before the maturity date
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If the deposit is claimed before the maturity date, interest shall be paid not at the
contracted rate but at the rate applicable to the period for which the deposit
remained with the bank and without charging penalty for pre-payment.
requirements.object: the contracted rate but at the rate applicable to the period for which the deposit remained with the bank and without charging penalty

conditions: In case the depositor dies before the date of maturity of the deposit
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case the depositor dies before the date of maturity of the deposit, but the
amount of the deposit is claimed after the date of maturity, interest shall be paid at
the contracted rate till the date of maturity and simple interest at the applicable rate
operative on the date of maturity for the period for which the deposit remained with
<image>
the bank beyond the date of maturity.
requirements.object: contracted rate till the date of maturity and simple interest at the applicable rate operative on the date of maturity for the period f

conditions: In case of death of the depositor after the date of maturity of the deposit
requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In case of death of the depositor after the date of maturity of the deposit, the
interest rate operative on the date of maturity in respect of savings deposit held
under RFC Account Scheme shall be paid from the date of maturity till the date of
payment.
requirements.object: date of maturity till the date of payment

conditions: In case the claimants are residents
requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In case the claimants are residents, the maturity proceeds shall be converted
into Indian Rupees on the date of maturity and interest shall be paid for the
subsequent period at the rate applicable to a domestic term deposit of similar
maturity.
requirements.object: Rupees on the date of maturity and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at the rate applicable to a domestic term

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may, at its discretion, on receipt of the request from the depositor, allow
FCNR(B) deposits of persons of Indian nationality / origin who return to India for
permanent settlement to continue till maturity at the contracted rate of interest
subject to the conditions that:
(1) The rate of interest as applicable to FCNR(B) deposits shall continue.

(2) Such deposits shall be treated as resident deposits from the date of return of the
account holder to India.
requirements.object: deposits from the date of return of the account holder to India

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The FCNR(B) deposits on maturity shall be converted into Resident Rupee
Deposit Account or RFC Account (if eligible) at the option of the account holder.
requirements.object: Rupee Deposit Account or RFC Account (if eligible) at the option of the account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The rate of interest on the new deposit (Rupee account or RFC Account) shall
be the relevant rate applicable for such deposit account.
requirements.object: applicable for such deposit account

requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to the conditions given in paragraph 6 of these Directions, a bank shall
pay interest at the time of conversion of FCNR(B) Account into RFC / Resident
Rupee Account even if the deposit has not completed the minimum maturity period
mentioned in paragraph 31(2)(i) above.
requirements.object: time of conversion of FCNR(B) Account into RFC / Resident Rupee Account even if the deposit has not completed the minimum maturity

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the rate of interest shall not exceed the rate payable on savings bank
deposits held under RFC Account Scheme.
requirements.object: on savings bank deposits held under RFC Account Scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, on request from the depositor, permit premature withdrawal of
deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme.
requirements.object: the depositor, permit premature withdrawal of deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
If the premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits takes place before completion
of the minimum stipulated period as mentioned in paragraph 31(2)(i) above, no
interest shall be paid.

There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
FCNR(B) term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the
Board to which powers have been delegated, subject to the following:
(1) The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of the deposits.
requirements.object: on penalties for premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated

requirements.full_sentence:
If not, the exchange loss arising
out of premature withdrawal shall be borne by the bank.
requirements.object: bank

requirements.full_sentence: (2) Penalty shall be levied on premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits
requirements.object: withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits

conditions:
In case of splitting of the amount of term deposit at the request from the
claimant(s)
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case of splitting of the amount of term deposit at the request from the
claimant(s), no penalty for premature withdrawal of the term deposit shall be levied if
the period and aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change.
requirements.object: period and aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A bank shall, at its discretion, levy penalty to recover the swap cost in the case
of premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits.
requirements.object: levy penalty to recover the swap cost in the case of premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) No penalties shall be levied in the case of premature conversion of balances
held in FCNR(B) deposits into RFC Accounts by Non-Resident Indians on their
return to India.
requirements.object: case of premature conversion of balances held in FCNR(B) deposits into RFC Accounts by Non-Resident Indians on their return to India

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentioned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.

A bank shall have the freedom to determine interest on deposits of money
<image>
accepted by it or renewed by it under the RFC Account Scheme, in accordance with
the comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits duly approved by the Board of
Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated.
requirements.object: determine interest on deposits of money <image> accepted by it or renewed by it under the RFC Account Scheme, in accordance with t

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not:
(1) Pay any remuneration or fees or commission or brokerage or incentives on
deposits in any form or manner to any individual, firm, company, association,
institution or any other person except:
Explanation For the purposes of this clause, 'political party' means an association or
body of individual citizens of India, which is, or is deemed to be registered with the
Election Commission of India as a political party under the Election Symbols
(Reservation and Allotment) Order, 1968 as in force for the time being.
requirements.object: remuneration or fees or commission or brokerage or incentives on deposits in any form or manner to any individual, firm, company, associ

requirements.full_sentence:
However, inexpensive
gifts costing not more than ₹250/- which is the amount prescribed by the Indian
Banks' Association (IBA) as part of the Ground Rules and Code of Ethics framed by
them, may, at a bank's discretion, be given to depositors at the time of accepting
deposits.
requirements.object: discretion, be given to depositors at the time of accepting deposits

requirements.full_sentence:
Simple rate of interest
per annum for the period of deposit should be indicated invariably.

The provisions in the above paragraphs shall not be applicable to:
(1) A deposit received by a bank:
requirements.object: A deposit received by a bank:

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein, and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
